chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/346)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/346)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي أَخَافُ أَنْ يَحْدُثَ حَدَثٌ وَ لَا أَلْقَاكَ فَأَخْبِرْنِي مَنِ الْإِمَامُ بَعْدَكَ فَقَالَ ابْنِي فُلَانٌ يَعْنِي أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Abu Al Al Khazzaz, from Dawood Bin Suleyman who said,

‘I said to Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), ‘I fear that an occurrence (death) would occur and I shall not meet you<sup>asws</sup>, therefore inform me<sup>asws</sup>, who is the Imam<sup>asws</sup> after you<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘My<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup> so and so’, meaning Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ahmad ibn Mihran has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from Abu Ali al-Khazzaz from Dawud ibn Sulay who has said the following. “I said to abu Ibrahim (a.s.), “I am afraid that an incident may take place and I will not be able to see you, inform me who will be the Imam after you?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “My son, so and so, meaning thereby abu al-Hassan (a.s.).”
